creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 233388
git diff for graphics/synfigstudio

A change to devel/etl caused this port to stop
building as reported by pkg-fallout@
The git diff attached to this pr fixes that and
also updates this port to 1.4.2.

Tested against:
make -DBATCH (check-plist | stage-qa | check-sanity) && portlint
All returned OK

NOT: this change depends on bug #263461

That's it.

Thanks!
